calendar.matters:
COMPLIANCE HEARING
Off Calendar Jun-07-2024 Off Calendar

HEARING ON PETITIONER KYLEN ANTHONY OSBORNE'S PETITION FOR CHANGE OF GENDER AND SEX IDENTIFIER, CHANGE OF NAME AND FOR ISSUANCE OF NEW CERTIFICATES
Off Calendar May-31-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The matter came on for Change of name and gender of Petitioner Kylen Anthony Osborne.

Dept.505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: N. Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:28 am and concluding at 9:45 am.

Petitioner Kylen Anthony Osborne appeared represented by Camille Frausto, Esq., was placed under oath and testified.

Petition for change of name and gender filed September 27, 2023.

Order to show cause filed September 27, 2023.

Notice of hearing filed December 5. 2023

The Court addresses the petitioner.

The Petitioner provides testimony.

The Court Finds that the change of name and gender will not affect public safty.

After reviewing the petition, hearing the testimony and there are no objections filed, The Court grants Petitioner's request for change of name and gender.

The matter is continued to June 7, 2024 for compliance of name registry.

HEARING ON PETITIONER KYLEN ANTHONY OSBORNE'S PETITION FOR CHANGE OF GENDER AND SEX IDENTIFIER, CHANGE OF NAME AND FOR ISSUANCE OF NEW CERTIFICATES
Off Calendar May-08-2024 Continued To May-31-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

HEARING ON PETITIONER KYLEN ANTHONY OSBORNE'S PETITION FOR CHANGE OF GENDER AND SEX IDENTIFIER, CHANGE OF NAME AND FOR ISSUANCE OF NEW CERTIFICATES
Off Calendar Feb-14-2024 Continued To May-08-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

HEARING ON PETITIONER KYLEN ANTHONY OSBORNE'S PETITION FOR CHANGE OF GENDER AND SEX IDENTIFIER, CHANGE OF NAME AND FOR ISSUANCE OF NEW CERTIFICATES
Off Calendar Jan-03-2024 Continued To Mar-06-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Petitioner's request for Change of Gender and Sex Identifier, Change of Name.

Dept. 505; Judge Maria Evangelista; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:25 am and concluding at 9:47 am.

Petitioner Kylen Osborne is present via zoom video conference represented by Camille Frausto, Esq. and placed under oath.

The Court addresses Petitioners counsel regarding Petitioners criminal record.

Petitioner's counsel presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

The Court requires further evidence and authorities regarding a person under 311.11 changing their name.

Petitioner requests a continuance of the matter in order to obtain further evidence and authorities.

Good cause appearing, Petitioner's Request for continuance is GRANTED.

The hearing on Petitioner's request for Change of Gender and Sex Identifier, Change of Name is reset for March 6, 2024 at 9:00am in Dept 505. (D505)
